annotation_target.structure: Dramatic middle section resolution — texture returns to ripples, dynamic softens
key_moments: m43 dynamic softens from dramatic peak
teaching_goals: the dramatic moment passes — return to the impressionistic shimmer
the transition back should feel natural, not abrupt
style_tips: pp returning — as if waking from a brief intense vision

teaching_notes.note: The dramatic peak passes — return to the shimmer without a seam.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 41–44 of Clair de Lune (Suite bergamasque, III) (continuation of mm. 37–40), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 41–44 and describe how this dramatic section resolves.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 41–44.

Measures 41–44 resolve the dramatic swell — the texture returns to the rippling triplets and the dynamic softens. The dramatic moment passes and the piece returns to its dreaming character. Let me loop mm. 41–44.
Clair de Lune mm. 41–44: dramatic swell resolves, ripples return, dynamic softens. Pairs with mm. 37–40.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
